machine_start_gcode:
;===== machine: A1 mini =========================
;===== date: 20240620 =====================

;===== preheat =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 2
M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}
M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; set bed temp
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
M9833.2
;===== startup sound =====
M17
M400 S1
M1006 S1
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C37 D10 M100 E37 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C41 D10 M100 E41 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C44 D10 M100 E44 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A43 B10 L100 C39 D10 M100 E46 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C39 D10 M100 E43 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C41 D10 M100 E41 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C44 D10 M100 E44 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C49 D10 M100 E49 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A44 B10 L100 C39 D10 M100 E48 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C39 D10 M100 E44 F10 N100
M1006 A0 B0 L100 C0 D10 M100 E0 F10 N100
M1006 A43 B10 L100 C39 D10 M100 E46 F10 N100
M1006 W
M18
;===== safe z-home =====
G91
G380 S2 Z30 F1200 ; probe down to find bed
G380 S3 Z-20 F1200
G1 Z5 F1200
G90

;===== reset machine =====
M204 S6000

M630 S0 P0
G91
M17 Z0.3 ; lower the z-motor current

G90
M17 X0.7 Y0.9 Z0.5 ; reset motor current to default
M960 S5 P1 ; logo lamp on
G90
M83
M220 S100 ; reset feedrate to 100%
M221 S100 ; reset flow to 100%
M73.2   R1.0 ; reset time estimate
;===== noise reduction =====
M982.2 S1 ; cog noise reduction on

;===== prepare filament =====
M400
M18
M109 S100 H170
M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)
M400
M17
M400
G28 X

M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops

M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on

; park head at brush position
G1 X0.0 F30000
G1 X-13.5 F3000

M620 M ; enable AMS remap
M620 S[initial_no_support_extruder]A   ; switch material if AMS exist
    G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 4
    M400
    M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN
    ; heat nozzle for loading
    M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
    M104 S250
    M400
    T[initial_no_support_extruder]
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    M400
    ; set AMS feed rate limits, heat to flush temp
    M620.1 E F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]/2.4053*60} T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[initial_no_support_extruder]}
    M109 S250 ;set nozzle to common flush temp
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
    ; first flush pass (slow)
    G92 E0
    G1 E50 F200
    M400
    M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}
    M104 S{nozzle_temperature_range_high[initial_no_support_extruder]}
    ; second flush pass (fast)
    G92 E0
    G1 E50 F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]/2.4053*60}
    M400
    M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
    ; short tip-forming retract
    G92 E0
    G1 E5 F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]/2.4053*60}
    M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_no_support_extruder]-20} ; drop nozzle temp, make filament shink a bit
    M104 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_no_support_extruder]-40}
    G92 E0
    G1 E-0.5 F300

    ; wipe on brush
    G1 X0 F30000
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F30000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X0 F30000
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_no_support_extruder]-40}
    G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
M621 S[initial_no_support_extruder]A

M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
;===== filament ready =====


;===== vibration check =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 3
G0 X25 Y175 F20000 ; find a soft place to home
;M104 S0
G28 Z P0 T300; home z with low precision,permit 300deg temperature
G29.2 S0 ; ABL off
M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)

; build plate detect
M1002 judge_flag build_plate_detect_flag
M622 S1
  G39.4
  M400
M623

; resonance calibration Y axis
G1 Z5 F3000
G1 X90 Y-1 F30000
M400 P200 ; wait 200ms
M970.3 Q1 A7 K0 O2
M974 Q1 S2 P0

; resonance calibration X axis
G1 X90 Y0 Z5 F30000
M400 P200 ; wait 200ms
M970 Q0 A10 B50 C90 H15 K0 M20 O3
M974 Q0 S2 P0

M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
; re-home XY after resonance test
G1 F30000
G1 X-1 Y10
G28 X ; re-home XY

;===== wipe nozzle =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 14
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on

M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)
M106 S128 ; turn on fan at 50% (quieter startup)
M211 S; push soft endstop status
M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops

; small retract before nozzle probe
M83
G1 E-1 F500
G90
M83

; probe bed surface at multiple X points to map nozzle tip
M109 S170
M104 S140 ; cool nozzle to 140 (safe for bed contact)
G0 X90 Y-4 F30000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X91 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X92 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X93 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X94 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X95 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X96 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X97 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X98 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X99 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X99 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X99 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X99 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X99 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200

; lift and move to bed brush area
G1 Z5 F30000
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
G1 X25 Y185 F30000.1 ;Brush material
G1 Z0.2 F30000.1
G1 Y185
; first brush sweep pass
G91
G1 X-30 F30000
G1 Y-2
G1 X27
G1 Y1.5
G1 X-28
G1 Y-2
G1 X30
G1 Y1.5
G1 X-30
G90
M83

; re-home Z before steel surface wipe
G1 Z5 F3000
G0 X50 Y175 F20000 ; find a soft place to home
G28 Z P0 T300; home z with low precision, permit 300deg temperature
G29.2 S0 ; ABL off

; wipe on exposed steel surface with arc motion
G0 X85 Y185 F10000 ;move to exposed steel surface and stop the nozzle
G0 Z-1.01 F10000
G91

G2 I1 J0 X2 Y0 F2000.1
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5

; second brush sweep pass
G90
G1 Z5 F30000
G1 X25 Y175 F30000.1 ;Brush material
G1 Z0.2 F30000.1
G1 Y185
G91
G1 X-30 F30000
G1 Y-2
G1 X27
G1 Y1.5
G1 X-28
G1 Y-2
G1 X30
G1 Y1.5
G1 X-30
G90
M83

; final Z home and nozzle scrub on steel
G1 Z5
G0 X55 Y175 F20000 ; find a soft place to home
G28 Z P0 T300; home z with low precision, permit 300deg temperature
G29.2 S0 ; ABL off

G1 Z10
G1 X85 Y185
G1 Z-1.01
G1 X95
G1 X90

M211 R; pop softend status

M106 S0 ; turn off fan , too noisy
;===== wipe done =====


;===== wait for bed temp =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 2
M104 S0 ; turn off hotend
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; wait for bed temp
M109 S140

; enable ABL, move to corner
G1 Z5 F3000
G29.2 S1 ; ABL on
G1 X10 Y10 F20000

;===== bed leveling =====
;M1002 set_flag g29_before_print_flag=1
M1002 judge_flag g29_before_print_flag
M622 J1
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 1
    G29 A1 X{first_layer_print_min[0]} Y{first_layer_print_min[1]} I{first_layer_print_size[0]} J{first_layer_print_size[1]} ; auto bed level
    M400
    M500 ; save calibration data
M623
;===== bed leveling done =====

;===== home after wipe =====
M1002 judge_flag g29_before_print_flag
M622 J0

    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 13
    G28 T145

M623

;===== homing done =====

M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
;===== purge line =====
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
G90
M83
T1000

; move to park position, prime extruder
G1 X-13.5 Y0 Z10 F10000
G1 E1.2 F500
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN
M109 S{nozzle_temperature[initial_extruder]}
M400

M412 S1 ; filament runout detection on
M400 P10

G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off

M620.3 W1 ; filament tangle detection on
M400 S2

M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}
;M1002 set_flag extrude_cali_flag=1
M1002 judge_flag extrude_cali_flag
M622 J1
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 8

    M400
    M900 K0.0 L1000.0 M1.0
    G90
    M83
    ; move to cali paint start position
    G0 X68 Y-4 F30000
    G0 Z0.3 F18000 ;Move to start position
    M400
    ; draw extrusion calibration paint stripes
    G0 X88 E10  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(24/20)    * 60}
    G0 X93 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X98 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X103 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X108 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X113 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 Y0 Z0 F20000
    M400

    ; return to park, prime for cali
    G1 X-13.5 Y0 Z10 F10000
    M400

    ; dynamic extrusion compensation calibration, pass 1
    G1 E10 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4*60}
    M983 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 H[nozzle_diameter]; cali dynamic extrusion compensation
    M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
    M400 S7
    ; wipe after cali pass 1
    G1 X0 F18000
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F18000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    M400
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off

    ; retry cali if pass 1 failed
    M1002 judge_last_extrude_cali_success
    M622 J0
        M983 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 H[nozzle_diameter]; cali dynamic extrusion compensation
        M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
        M400 S7
        G1 X0 F18000
        G1 X-13.5 F3000
        G1 X0 F18000 ;wipe and shake
        G1 X-13.5 F3000
        G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
        M400
        M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
    M623

    ; dynamic extrusion compensation calibration, pass 2 (M984)
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    M400
    M984 A0.1 E1 S1 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} H[nozzle_diameter]
    M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
    M400 S7
    ; wipe after cali pass 2
    G1 X0 F18000
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F18000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-13.5 F3000
    M400
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off

M623 ; end of "draw extrinsic para cali paint"

;===== extrusion calibration =====
; purge line at print start
M104 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}
G90
M83
G0 X68 Y-2.5 F30000
G0 Z0.3 F18000 ;Move to start position
G0 X88 E10  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(24/20)    * 60}
G0 X93 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
G0 X98 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
G0 X103 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
G0 X108 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
G0 X113 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
G0 X115 Z0 F20000
G0 Z5
M400

;===== wait for print temp =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 0

M400 ; wait all motion done before implement the emprical L parameters

;===== z-offset per plate type =====
;curr_bed_type={curr_bed_type}
{if curr_bed_type=="Textured PEI Plate"}
G29.1 Z{-0.04} ; z-offset -0.04 for textured PEI
{else}
G29.1 Z{-0.02} ; for other plates
{endif}

; lasers and fans off before print
M960 S1 P0 ; laser off
M960 S2 P0 ; laser off
M106 S0 ; turn off fan
M106 P2 S0 ; aux fan off
M106 P3 S0 ; chamber fan off

; final pre-print setup
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
G90
M83
T1000

M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops
M1007 S1 ; mass estimation on
change_filament_gcode:
;===== machine: A1 mini =========================
;===== date: 20240913 =====================
; init: clog detect off, mass estimation off, begin AMS swap
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
M1007 S0 ; mass estimation off
M620 S[next_extruder]A
M204 S9000
; spiral lift if not first toolchange
{if toolchange_count > 1}
G17
G2 Z{max_layer_z + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F10000 ; spiral lift a little from second lift
{endif}
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200

; fans off, heat old filament for retraction
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
M106 P2 S0 ; aux fan off
{if old_filament_temp > 142 && next_extruder < 255}
M104 S[old_filament_temp]
{endif}

; move head to right side for AMS cut
G1 X180 F9000

; long retraction before cut (if configured)
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
M620.11 S1 I[previous_extruder] E-{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F1200
{else}
M620.11 S0
{endif}
M400

; configure old and new filament feed rates, trigger toolchange
M620.1 E F[old_filament_e_feedrate] T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder]}
M620.10 A0 F[old_filament_e_feedrate]
T[next_extruder]
M620.1 E F[new_filament_e_feedrate] T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]}
M620.10 A1 F[new_filament_e_feedrate] L[flush_length] H[nozzle_diameter] T[nozzle_temperature_range_high]

; move bed forward while AMS loads new filament
G1 Y90 F9000

{if next_extruder < 255}

; re-feed long retraction after cut
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
M620.11 S1 I[previous_extruder] E{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
M628 S1
G92 E0
G1 E{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F[old_filament_e_feedrate]
M400
M629 S1
{else}
M620.11 S0
{endif}

M400
G92 E0
M628 S0

{if flush_length_1 > 1}
; FLUSH_START
; always use highest temperature to flush
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_range_high]
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; flush pass 1: pulsatile purge of old filament
{if flush_length_1 > 23.7}
G1 E23.7 F{old_filament_e_feedrate} ; do not need pulsatile flushing for start part
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
{else}
G1 E{flush_length_1} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
{endif}
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[old_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[old_retract_length_toolchange] F300
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[next_extruder]}
{endif}

; wipe on brush between flush pass 1 and 2 (if flush 1 was long enough)
{if flush_length_1 > 45 && flush_length_2 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_2 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush pass 2: pulsatile purge with new filament
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[new_retract_length_toolchange] F300
{endif}

; wipe between flush pass 2 and 3
{if flush_length_2 > 45 && flush_length_3 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_3 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush pass 3
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[new_retract_length_toolchange] F300
{endif}

; wipe between flush pass 3 and 4
{if flush_length_3 > 45 && flush_length_4 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_4 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush pass 4
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
{endif}

M629

; wait for new filament temp, compensate drool, final wipe
M400
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
M109 S[new_filament_temp]
G1 E5 F{new_filament_e_feedrate} ;Compensate for filament spillage during waiting temperature
M400
G92 E0
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
M400
; final brush wipe sequence
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
G1 X-3.5 F9000
G1 X-13.5 F3000
M400
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F3000
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
; restore acceleration for layer height
{if layer_z <= (initial_layer_print_height + 0.001)}
M204 S[initial_layer_acceleration]
{else}
M204 S[default_acceleration]
{endif}
{else}
; next_extruder >= 255: no toolchange, just reposition
G1 X[x_after_toolchange] Y[y_after_toolchange] Z[z_after_toolchange] F12000
{endif}

; dynamic extrusion cali if filament flagged for recalibration
M622.1 S0
M9833 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 ; cali dynamic extrusion compensation
M1002 judge_flag filament_need_cali_flag
M622 J1
  G92 E0
  G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
  M400

  ; wipe after post-toolchange cali
  M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
  M400 S7
  G1 X0 F9000
  G1 X-13.5 F3000
  G1 X0 F9000 ;wipe and shake
  G1 X-13.5 F3000
  G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
  G1 X-13.5 F3000
  G1 X0 F12000 ;wipe and shake
  M400
  M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
M623

; finalize AMS swap, re-enable clog detect and mass estimation
M621 S[next_extruder]A
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off

M1007 S1 ; mass estimation on
